text:
39 = Organ donor Null/missing 

COMMENT: This field is new in 2011. It comes from the patient relationship code (CLM-PTNT-RLTNSHP-CD) that is 
present on the first claim record included in the stay. If there is no patient relationship code on the 1st 
claim, then take the first found code on any of the other claims that make up the stay.
